title: Fix O(n²) list-append in a recursive collector
prompt: Refactor `MyApp.Collector.numbered/1` and its helpers in test_fixtures/list_append_loop.ex. The original uses `acc ++ [{n, head}]` which is O(n) per step, giving O(n²) total. Rewrite the helper to prepend `[{n, head} | acc]` and reverse the final accumulator. Apply the same fix to `positive_only/1` and `chars_to_upper/1`. Output a complete `defmodule MyApp.Collector do ... end`.
tier_rationale: Three helpers to fix consistently. Pattern is well-known but must be applied uniformly.
research_citation: georgeguimaraes elixir-thinking: 'Prepend to lists [new | list] not list ++ [new]'
